title: 2020 AGM November 20 at 7 PM
excerpt: The 2020 ESC AGM will be held this Friday, November 20th, at 7 PM. All members are invited to join by phone or by Zoom. The meeting ID, link and password can be obtained by checking your invitation in your email emailing esc.board@edmontonsquashclub.org or contacting the front desk. The agenda can be found below.
content:
The 2020 ESC AGM will be held this Friday, November 20th, at 7 PM. All members are invited to join by phone or by Zoom. The meeting ID, link and password can be obtained by checking your invitation in your email emailing esc.board@edmontonsquashclub.org or contacting the front desk.

The agenda can be found below.

2020-11-23-ESC-AGM-Agenda-Distributed-copy
